title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Mahindra & Mahindra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Mahindra & Mahindra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Mahindra & Mahindra in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra & Mahindra:
Mahindra & Mahindra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra!
